audit_items.proof_trace: The contract maintains the invariant `active_auction ↔ decimals != 0` via two gating mechanisms: (1) `_applyAssetParamsUpdates` removal path (L611) reverts with `LiveAuction` if `s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0`, so `decimals` can only be zeroed when no auction is active; (2) auction start (L334) reverts with `AssetParamsNotSet` if `decimals == 0`, preventing a new auction from being started post-removal. Therefore, whenever `decimals == 0`, `auctionStart == 0` invariantly holds, and `bid()` reverts at L425 with `InvalidAuction`.
